mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO AI_DOC_CHECK ( CHECK_ID, RISK_SCORE, RISK_RESULT, CHECK_DATE, DOC_NUMBER, DOC_SCORE, DOC_COMMENT, RISK_COMMENT ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHECK_ID.NEXTVAL, #{riskScore},
CASE WHEN #{riskScore} >= 50 THEN 'RED' ELSE 'GREEN' END , SYSDATE, #{docNumber}, #{docScore}, #{docComment}, #{riskComment} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_doc_check SET RISK_SCORE = #{riskScore}, RISK_RESULT = #{riskResult}, CHECK_DATE = SYSDATE, DOC_SCORE = #{docScore}, DOC_COMMENT = #{docComment}, RISK_COMMENT = #{riskComment} WHERE doc_number = #{docNumber}
